Defines OTP slot identifiers and functions to get and check lock status of OTP slots.

# Purpose
This C header file defines an enumeration and declares functions related to OTP (One-Time Programmable) memory slots. The enumeration assigns specific integer values to different OTP slots, such as `OTP_SERIAL1`, `OTP_HWVER`, and others, which are used to identify various hardware and serial number slots. The `NUM_OTP_SLOTS` constant defines the total number of OTP slots available. The file declares three functions: [`otp_get_lock`](<#otp_get_lock>), which returns a pointer to a lock status for a given OTP slot index; [`otp_is_locked`](<#otp_is_locked>), which checks if a specific OTP slot is locked; and [`otp_get_slot`](<#otp_get_slot>), which retrieves a pointer to the data stored in a specified OTP slot. These functions facilitate interaction with OTP memory by providing mechanisms to access and verify the lock status of the slots.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `stdint.h`
- `stdbool.h`
